title: Production ML and MLOps Practices - Factual Source
content:
Production practices reflected across the career guides:
- End-to-end ownership from data preprocessing and model training to deployment, monitoring, and iteration.
- Cloud-native ML delivery patterns including containerized workloads and API-based integration.
- Reliability-focused practices such as confidence gating, fallback pathways, and incident response discipline.

RAG and LLM operational practices highlighted:
- Retrieval quality tuning through chunking and ranking strategy updates.
- Validation layers for structured extraction outputs to reduce factual errors.
- Cost-performance balancing through model routing and caching strategies.

Cross-role engineering principles:
- Align model outputs with downstream business workflows and SLA expectations.
- Prioritize measurable operational outcomes, not just benchmark metrics.
- Maintain explainability and stakeholder trust in high-impact, compliance-sensitive contexts.
